---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for authorized use cases
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Authorized-use case

Explain the legitimate, permitted use case. Do not include private service names, account details, or sensitive screenshots.

## Proposed behavior

What should the app do?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Privacy and security considerations

Does this require new permissions, broader AccessibilityService access, additional storage, or new network behavior?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

If yes or unsure, explain how the change will preserve user consent, data minimization, and disclosure accuracy.

## Testing plan

How should this be tested?
